full_text:
Pei Yuanshao 裴元紹
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Pei Yuanshao (裴元紹). Former Yellow Scarve killed by Zhao Yun during an attempt to steal his horse. Pei Yuanshao is a fictional character. Pei Yuanshao was affiliated with Yellow Scarves. Pei Yuanshao lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
